## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Type

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `nx affected -t lint test build` is green (production build, not just dev)
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] Semantic tokens only — no hardcoded colors, dark mode stays class-based
- [ ] Changeset added (`npm run changeset`) if this touches a published package
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env` values committed
